content.cn_text: 第3部分。你将听到两名学生 Tom 和 Bella 参加第三次会议，
content.en_text: Section 3. You will hear two students called Tom and Bella attending the third meeting

content.cn_text: 这是课后俱乐部的会议。他们正在和教授讨论一家家具公司。
content.en_text: of the after school club. They are talking with their professor about the furniture company.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间查看问题21到26。
content.en_text: First, you have some time to look at questions 21 to 26.

content.cn_text: 现在请仔细听，并回答问题21到26。
content.en_text: Now, listen carefully and answer questions 21 to 26.

content.cn_text: Professor：在开始之前，Tom 和 Bella，感谢你们今天来讨论这些关键案例研究，
content.en_text: Professor: Before we start, Tom and Bella, thanks for coming in today to talk about the key case studies

content.cn_text: 这些案例会帮助你们更好地理解课堂内容。
content.en_text: that will help you to understand your classwork better.

content.cn_text: 现在，我希望你们已经读过我上周给你们的关于家具公司 Willows 的笔记。
content.en_text: Now, I hope you've read the notes I gave you last week on the furniture company Willows.

content.cn_text: 因为这将是我们今天讨论的重点，那么开始吧。
content.en_text: As this will be the focus of our discussion today, let's begin.

content.cn_text: 谁能告诉我这家公司目前的业务重点是什么？
content.en_text: Who can tell me what the current focus of the company's business is?

content.cn_text: Tom：这家公司以前规模很大，在全国有很多零售门店。
content.en_text: Tom: The company used to be very large with many retail outlets across the country.

content.cn_text: 然而，自从经济衰退以来，花钱买家具的人变少了，
content.en_text: However, since the recession, there have been fewer people spending money on furniture

content.cn_text: 所以这家公司被迫关闭了所有门店，现在只在线上运营。
content.en_text: and so the company was forced to close all of its outlets and now only operates online.

content.cn_text: Professor：很好，Tom。Bella，你能补充些什么吗？
content.en_text: Professor: Well done, Tom. Bella, can you add anything?

content.cn_text: Bella：Willows 以前生产很多种产品，比如桌子、椅子和灯具。
content.en_text: Bella: Willows used to produce a very large number of products such as tables, chairs and light fittings.

content.cn_text: 但是，通过市场调研，他们意识到大部分利润来自书柜销售，
content.en_text: However, through market research, they realized that most of their profit was made from the sale of bookcases

content.cn_text: 所以他们现在专门经营这一种产品。
content.en_text: so they now specialize in this one product.

content.cn_text: Professor：很好。有人知道我们系是怎么开始和 Willows 联系的吗？
content.en_text: Professor: Very good. Does anyone know how our department began its contact with Willows?

content.cn_text: Tom：是您联系了这家公司吗，教授？
content.en_text: Tom: Did you contact the company, Professor?

content.cn_text: Professor：不是，Tom。不是通过我。
content.en_text: Professor: No, Tom. It wasn't through me.

content.cn_text: Bella: 我们的校长看到了经理在报纸上写的一篇文章，
content.en_text: Bella: Our headmaster saw an article that the manager had written in the newspaper

content.cn_text: 然后对这家公司产生了很大兴趣。
content.en_text: and became very interested in the company.

content.cn_text: 他联系了 Willows，并安排一名学生暑假在那里全职工作。
content.en_text: He contacted Willows and arranged for a student to work there full time during the summer.

content.cn_text: Professor：是的，没错。有人知道那名学生对在 Willows 工作的经历有什么看法吗？
content.en_text: Professor: Yes, exactly. Does anyone know what the student thought of their time working at Willows?

content.cn_text: Tom：知道，他是我们的朋友。他是设计团队成员，用电脑制作家具的技术图纸。
content.en_text: Tom: Yes, he is a friend of ours. He worked as a member of the design team, creating technical drawings of the furniture using a computer.

content.cn_text: 他使用了一款特殊软件，他说这个软件界面很差，而且很难预测。
content.en_text: There was a special software that he used, which he said had a bad interface and was very difficult to predict.

content.cn_text: 不过，它效率很高，对快速绘制家具设计图很有帮助。
content.en_text: However, it was very efficient and helpful for quickly drawing up furniture designs.

content.cn_text: Professor：真有意思。
content.en_text: Professor: How interesting.

content.cn_text: Bella：是的。我们在他在那里工作时去看过他，他带我们参观了一下。
content.en_text: Bella: Yes, it was. We both visited him whilst he was working there and he showed us around.

content.cn_text: 可惜访客不能进入IT 部门，但和他的同事聊天很不错。
content.en_text: Unfortunately, visitors were not allowed to access the IT department, but it was great to chat with his colleagues.

content.cn_text: Professor：你们见到他的经理了吗？
content.en_text: Professor: Did you meet his manager?

content.cn_text: Tom：他的经理很忙，所以没有时间见我们。
content.en_text: Tom: His manager is a very busy man, so he didn't have time to meet with us.

content.cn_text: 不过，我们被允许查看账目，这确实帮助我们理解了软件对公司的影响。
content.en_text: However, we were allowed to inspect the accounts, which really helped us to understand the effects of the software on the company.

content.cn_text: Professor：嗯，真是一次令人兴奋的经历。
content.en_text: Professor: Well, what an exciting experience.

content.cn_text: 对了，在我忘记之前，下周我会和你们每个人进行面对面面试，帮助你们准备求职面试。
content.en_text: Now, before I forget, next week I'll be conducting face-to-face interviews with each of you to prepare for job interviews.

content.cn_text: Bella：我们可以小组一起做吗？
content.en_text: Bella: Can we do it as a group?

content.cn_text: Professor：恐怕不行，Bella。我想把全部注意力放在你们每个人身上，如果一起面试，干扰会太多。
content.en_text: Professor: I'm afraid not, Bella. I want to give each of you my undivided attention, and there will be too much disturbance if I interview you altogether.

content.cn_text: 而且，如果我单独面试你们，会更真实。
content.en_text: Plus, it will be more realistic if I interview you alone.

content.cn_text: Tom：教授，您写完我们考试成绩的反馈了吗？
content.en_text: Tom: Have you finished writing the feedback on our exam results, Professor?

content.cn_text: Professor：写完了，Tom。而且我必须说，我并不失望。
content.en_text: Professor: Yes, I have, Tom. And I must say that I was not disappointed.

content.cn_text: 我很高兴地说，自从你们开始参加这个课后俱乐部以来，你们的表现有了显著提升，而且你们两人都高于平均分。
content.en_text: I am glad to say that your performance has dramatically increased since you began attending this after school club, and you have both scored above the average.

content.cn_text: 如果你们继续努力，成绩应该很快会显著提高。
content.en_text: If you continue to work hard, your results should soon improve significantly.

content.cn_text: 在你听剩下的对话之前，你有一些时间查看问题27到30。
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the conversation, you have some time to look at questions 27-30.

content.cn_text: 现在请听并回答问题27到30。
content.en_text: Now, listen and answer questions 27-30.

content.cn_text: Professor：现在回到我们关于 Willows 的讨论。有人能说说哪些商业决策可能会让公司受益吗？
content.en_text: Professor: Now, back to our discussion about Willows. Can anyone tell me what business decisions might benefit the company?

content.cn_text: Bella：新系统肯定会让 Willows 受益。他们的系统非常过时。我不认为它会帮助他们获得更多利润。
content.en_text: Bella: A new system would definitely benefit Willows. Their system is very outdated. I don't think it would help them to gain more profit.

content.cn_text: 不过，这个系统能够完成数百人的工作。因此，它会显著降低劳动力成本。
content.en_text: However, the system is capable of doing the work of hundreds of people. This would, therefore, significantly lower labor costs.

content.cn_text: Tom：我同意。可惜的是，除非他们同时更换车间里的机器，否则新系统不会缩短生产时间。
content.en_text: Tom: I agree. Unfortunately, unless they also replace the machinery in their workshop, the new system won't reduce the production time.

content.cn_text: Bella：那真可惜。如果他们不能缩短生产时间，就无法增加销量。
content.en_text: Bella: That is a shame. If they can't reduce their production time, they won't be able to increase sales.

content.cn_text: 解决办法是雇用更多员工，以提高生产线效率。
content.en_text: The answer is to hire more staff in order to increase the efficiency of the production line.

content.cn_text: Professor：是的，你们都提出了很有意思的观点。现在，在结束本周课程前，还有最后一个问题。
content.en_text: Professor: Yes, you have both made interesting points. Now for one final question before we finish this week's session.

content.cn_text: 新客户会受到新系统怎样的影响？
content.en_text: How will new clients be affected by the new system?

content.cn_text: Tom：可惜的是，新系统不允许客户从家里连接到 Willows 系统，所以他们无法在线访问自己的工作。
content.en_text: Tom: Unfortunately, the new system does not allow clients to connect to the Willows system from home, so they are unable to access their work online.

content.cn_text: 这也意味着该系统没有机会吸引更多联系对象，因为客户无法在家查看。
content.en_text: This also means that the system presents no opportunity to attract more contacts, since clients are unable to view it from their homes.

content.cn_text: Bella：是的，确实如此。不过，它肯定会让参观展厅的客户受益。
content.en_text: Bella: Yes, that's true. However, it could definitely benefit clients who visit the showroom.

content.cn_text: 这个系统互动性很强，允许客户轻松浏览家具目录，这会为他们节省大量时间。
content.en_text: The system is very interactive and allows clients to easily browse the furniture catalog, which will save them a lot of time.

content.cn_text: 可惜的是，仍然需要员工指导客户使用在线系统，这意味着无法节省劳动力成本。
content.en_text: It's a shame that staff are still needed to guide clients through the online system, as it means that no savings can be made in labor costs.

content.cn_text: Tom：我认为新系统的主要好处是，它让员工能够在客户面前设计家具，这使客户能更多地参与到设计中。
content.en_text: Tom: I think the major benefit of the new system is that it enables staff to design the furniture in front of the client, which allows them to get a lot more involved in the design.

content.cn_text: Professor：很好，你们两人都为这次讨论贡献了很棒的观点。今天的课程到此结束。下周见。
content.en_text: Professor: Bravo, you've both contributed fantastic points to our conversation. That concludes our session for today. I'll see you next week.

content.cn_text: 第3部分到此结束。现在你有半分钟时间检查答案。
content.en_text: That is the end of section 3. You now have half a minute to check your answers.

content.cn_text: 如果你有任何问题，请在下方评论中告诉我们。
content.en_text: If you have any questions, please let us know in the comments below.

content.cn_text: 感谢你的时间。
content.en_text: Thank you for your time.

content.cn_text: 谢谢。
content.en_text: Thank you.

content.cn_text: 谢谢。
content.en_text: Thank you.

content.cn_text: 谢谢。
content.en_text: Thank you.

content.cn_text: 谢谢。
content.en_text: Thank you.

content.cn_text: 现在请翻到第4部分。
content.en_text: Now turn to section 4.

content.cn_text: 谢谢。
content.en_text: Thank you.

groups.desc: Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.
groups.title: Questions 21–26

items.title: What field is Willows currently focused on?

options.title: C
options.content: adding a lot of retail outlet

items.analysis: 答案解析：第21题问 Willows 目前专注于什么领域。原文说 they now specialize in this one product，所以答案是 A。

items.title: How did the students hear about the software?

options.title: B
options.content: An article was read in a newspaper.

options.title: C
options.content: A student worked there part-time during the vacations.

items.analysis: 答案解析：第22题问学生是如何听说这个软件/公司经历的。原文说校长读了经理在报纸上的文章后联系公司，并安排学生暑假去工作；结合题目选项，答案是 B。

items.title: How did the student feel about the software?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第23题问学生对软件的感受。原文说软件 very difficult to predict，所以答案是 A。

items.title: How did the students find out about the effects of the software on the company?

options.title: A
options.content: They went to the IT department.

items.analysis: 答案解析：第24题问学生如何了解软件对公司的影响。原文说 they were allowed to inspect the accounts，所以答案是 C。

items.title: The reason why the students have a face-to-face interview alone is that
items.analysis: 答案解析：第25题问为什么学生要单独进行面对面面试。原文说一起面试会有太多干扰，所以单独面试干扰更少，答案是 B。

items.title: How did the two students perform in the exam?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第26题问两名学生在考试中表现如何。原文说 they have both scored above the average，所以答案是 C。

groups.desc:
Choose TWO letters, A–E.
In which TWO ways will the new system affect the company?
groups.title: Questions 27–28

items.title: In which TWO ways will the new system affect the company?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第27题问新系统/相关商业决策会以哪种方式影响公司。原文说解决办法是 hire more staff，所以答案是 B. employ more new staff。

items.title: In which TWO ways will the new system affect the company?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第28题问新系统会以哪种方式影响公司。原文说新系统可以 significantly lower labor costs，所以答案是 E. cut labour costs。

groups.desc:
Choose TWO letters, A–E.
Which TWO effects will the new system have on new clients?
groups.title: Questions 29 and 30

list.title: A
list.content: getting more involved in the design

list.title: C
list.content: linking at home to do online work

items.title: Which TWO effects will the new system have on new clients?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第29题问新系统对新客户的影响。原文说客户可以 get a lot more involved in the design，所以答案是 A. getting more involved in the design。

items.title: Which TWO effects will the new system have on new clients?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第30题问新系统对新客户的影响。原文说客户可以轻松浏览目录，save them a lot of time，所以答案是 D. wasting less time。
